The two '''[[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]''{{'s}} carried aboard [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruisers]] carried 8 passengers each. They could only be activated from the inside.

==Appearances==
*[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1]]

*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]]
